channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The FCC just saved Netgear from its router ban for no obvious reason
item.description: The United States' foreign router ban didn't make a whole lot of sense, and today may not change that. The FCC has just granted Netgear a conditional approval to import its future consumer routers, cable modems, and cable gateways into the US through October 1st, 2027 - even though the company builds those devices in […]

item.title: YouTube Will Stop Showing Ads If You Just Engage Hard Enough
Norway Man Cured of HIV With Brother’s Stem Cells
item.description: The Oslo patient is the first person to be cured by a family member's bone marrow transplant.

item.title: New Mercedes EQS Has Long Range, Quick Charging, and Quicker Steering
item.description: Mercedes-Benz is taking another run at the EV market.

item.title: 'Smartphones have physical limitations': Report explains why AI is kickstarting a billion-dollar hardware arms race for millions of creators worldwide
item.description: AI is speeding up production cycles and increasing pressure on creators to acquire better cameras, microphones, and stabilization gear.

item.title: What to expect from Google I/O 2026
item.description: We're sliding into developer conference season and one of the biggest events on the upcoming calendar is Google I/O. This year's edition is taking place on May 19 and 20. As usual, the in-person element will happen in Mountain View, California, though many of the keynotes and sessions will be livestreamed. Google will surely make its biggest announcements during the opening keynote, which will start at 1PM ET on May 19. A developer keynote will take place later the same day.As ever, the rumor mill will pick up speed in the leadup to Google I/O. We do have some ideas about what Google will disc...

item.title: In the Wake of Anthropic’s Mythos, OpenAI Has a New Cybersecurity Model—and Strategy
item.description: OpenAI says its safeguards “sufficiently reduce cyber risk” for now, while GPT-5.4-Cyber is a new cybersecurity-focused model.

item.title: That ‘Maul: Shadow Lord’ Lightsaber Moment Isn’t What You Think It Is
item.description: Executive producer Brad Rau tells io9 about that encounter between Maul and Devon—and one strange sound in particular.

item.title: The RAM crisis strikes again — Samsung Galaxy phones and Microsoft Surface laptops just got a whole lot more expensive
item.description: 'Apple is now the value brand': More RAM misery as Microsoft hikes Surface prices in a big way.

item.title: Delta’s swanky new suite is designed for side sleepers
item.description: The next frontier of the premium airline wars is who can design the seat that feels the most like a bed. Delta just unveiled the new version of its most premium seat, and it’s designed to let passengers stretch out just like they would in their bed at home.

item.title: Memorial Day sales 2026 — when they start and what deals you can expect
item.description: Memorial Day sales will be here before you know it, so I've created this guide with everything you need to know, including the date and what deals you can expect.

item.title: League of Legends' new WASD control scheme will be enabled for ranked later this month
item.description: Riot Games released a pile of updates for its long-running MOBA League of Legends. One of the more noteworthy changes coming to the game is the official launch of WASD controls. This alternate option, allowing players to traverse the rift by keyboard rather than by mouse, is rolling out to ranked matches in patch 26.9. Riot first announced that it was pursuing support for WASD controls last August. The studio said it wanted to ensure that the alternate control scheme wasn't more powerful than point-and-click movement; Riot said it was targeting a low win-loss rate difference between the option...

item.title: The Most WIRED Watches at Watches and Wonders 2026
item.description: Forget worldly woes for a few minutes and gawk at these spectacular and mind-bogglingly spendy timepieces we saw in Geneva.

item.title: Dozens of 4K Blu-rays are included in Amazon’s three for $33 sale
item.description: Amazon has switched on its semi-regular three for $33 sale for a large batch of 4K Blu-ray movies. As usual, there are too many to list individually, though it’s a comprehensive mix of old and new flicks that should keep physical media fans scrolling for a minute. The steps to get in on the deal […]

item.title: Exit 8 director Genki Kawamura reveals the eerie filmmaking technique he learned from Parasite's Bong Joon Ho
item.description: Exit 8 has one big, impressive moment, and director Genki Kawamura has explained how he managed to film it.

item.title: ‘How could you ask me that question?’ Looksmaxxer Clavicular storms out of ’60 minutes’ interview
item.description: The New Jersey-born influencer has been profiled by a number of mainstream news outlets recently. This time he got interview ‘mogged.’ Looksmaxxer leader Braden Peters—better known as Clavicular or “Clav”—likes to smash his cheekbones with a hammer and do meth to stay lean. What does he not like? Being associated with the incel community or questioned about his manosphere friendships on television....

item.title: I've found 7 top laptop deals in the latest Best Buy sale — HP, Asus, Lenovo, and Apple from $159
item.description: The Best Buy Ultimate Upgrade sale features some excellent laptop deals this week, so I've picked out seven of the top offers that I'd recommend buying.

item.title: Cette comète va devenir visible à l’œil nu et ce sera notre seule chance : voici comment l’observer
item.description: La comète C/2025 R3 va devenir visible depuis la Terre d'ici quelques jours. Une occasion rare pour observer un astre, dont le passage s'annonce spectaculaire. Voici quelques conseils pour pouvoir en profiter un maximum.

item.title: Marvel Legends Is Taking on ‘Marvel Rivals,’ and It Looks Great
item.description: The first wave of Hasbro figures inspired by the hit hero shooter isn't forming a meta-comp team any time soon, but they make up for it with some stylish looks.
